所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka,
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka.configuration,
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka.consumer,
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler,
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.configuration.AutoKafkaConfiguration
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.consumer.ConsumerProperties
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.ExecutorConf
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.consumer.KafkaConsumer (implements reactor.core.Disposable, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.consumer.KafkaConsumerFactory (implements org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware, org.springframework.beans.factory.DisposableBean, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender.KafkaProducer (implements reactor.core.Disposable, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.configuration.KafkaProperties (implements org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.KafkaUtil
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.consumer.ReactorKafkaReceiver (implements reactor.core.Disposable, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender.ReactorKafkaSender (implements reactor.core.Disposable, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.sender.SenderProperties

接口分层结构

  • java.util.function.Consumer<T>
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.KafkaHandler (并 extends io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.IKafkaHandler)
  • java.util.function.Function<T,R>
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.ReactorKafkaHandler (并 extends io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.IKafkaHandler)
  • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.IKafkaHandler
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.KafkaHandler (并 extends java.util.function.Consumer<T>)
    • io.github.wooernico.kafka.handler.ReactorKafkaHandler (并 extends java.util.function.Function<T,R>)
